feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is she forgiven?
entry.content: Is she forgiven?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: YYYEEEEEEEE HAAAAAAWWW!!
entry.content: YYYEEEEEEEE HAAAAAAWWW!!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The game industry is making me incredibly depressed and I'm done
entry.content: Everything coming out this past month from Sony, Microsoft, Steam, GTA, Bethesda, Bungie, EVERYTHING has been a daily dose of end stage capitalism. Game developers deserve to have jobs, and youre not entitled to ruin their lives by firing them just because you now own a company. Nothing about the games industry has me excited and I'm happy I got a PS5, Xbox X, Xbox S and Nintendo Switch because I am not buying another console again. I'm not a mindless consumer. This industry is on the fast track

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Sony
entry.content: Somebody's leaning on them. You don't just torpedo half your business model and make yourself the center of public ridicule for the fun of it. Somebody's leaning on them to do this. My guess is Larry Fink but it's equally possible it could be somebody from State Street or Vanguard.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >never wanted to become my dad >"When I'M an adult I'll stay up to date with wha…
entry.content: >never wanted to become my dad >"When I'M an adult I'll stay up to date with what's cool and current! You'll never find me being the old man who hates everything the kids are into!" >become that adult >do try to keep up with current trends in entertainment >only to discover they just suck compared to what I grew up with and weren't worth keeping up with Maybe my dad was right.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I lost my discs. Well, actually I didn't lose it, it lost me. I overbought digit…
entry.content: I lost my discs. Well, actually I didn't lose it, it lost me. I overbought digital, under collected physical. Maybe it's the other way around, I forget. But discs are obsolete. Theyre not economically viable.

entry.title: /int/ International: How do I get my shit together unironically I don't want to live like this anymor…
entry.content: How do I get my shit together unironically I don't want to live like this anymore, not even a single more day But I can't change anything. it's like the universe cursed me with inertia. and I'm growing more demoralized and slow each passing day.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Imitation Game is a great film
entry.content: Benedict Cumberbatch does a brilliant job of highlighting the evils of bigotry and religious opposition to scientific progress. What the world needs right now is to replace all of these old useless Christian feast days and celebrations with days dedicated to the saints of gay rights and liberation: Harvey Milk, Oscar Wilde, Alan Turing, Freddie Mercury, etc. These are the new saints. Let's celebrate "Michel Foucault Day" instead of Easter Sunday. >>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n uPZUUED5uk

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >apt install --no-install-recommends A >Installing dependencies: B C >apt autore…
entry.content: >apt install --no-install-recommends A >Installing dependencies: B C >apt autoremove --purge A >Removing dependencies: B After installing A, C become recommended dependency for previously installed package D, thus apt autoremove will not remove it 33 years of development btw

entry.content: What's up /trash/, I come requesting some advice from you guys today since /r/ is gone. Lately I've been heavily getting into gooning content. Captions, hypno videos, audio encouragement files to listen to while watching porn, etc. I found out that some creators are selling audio files like that on Patreon, and some of them make $1k a month off it. Now, I want to start making some gooning content like that but focused on fat fetish stuff (almost nothing like that exists currently, it's all focus

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Locking down the internet is pretty obviously a necessary preparation for WW3. S…
entry.content: Locking down the internet is pretty obviously a necessary preparation for WW3. So why do you keep complaining? You can just not use it lmao Or make your own internet, with blackjack, and hookers. If you're going to blame anyone, maybe you should blame the people preparing to go to war with us? >oh nooo i can not be free to use your platform Your freedoms haven't been changed. This is on par with crying about being booted out of a discord for screaming the N word

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm enjoying watching the entire gaming industry crash and burn. We're only half…
entry.content: I'm enjoying watching the entire gaming industry crash and burn. We're only halfway through 2026. Who knows what the next six months will bring? I'm not even thinking about what 2027 will be like. Isn't it exciting? You keep thinking "Well, it can't get any worse." But it always can get worse. More price hikes? More layoffs? PS6 and Helix will probably cost like $1,300, but at least you still have 2027 to buy physical PlayStation games. Nintendo basically already said fuck physical, and now Play

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Giving thanks to Ganesha
entry.content: Look. I am not Hindu. I am white as Hitler and even more fucked up. But I need to tell the Indian guys here something nice. I saw a simple image of Ganesha and I simply projected my own internal need for obstruction in my life to be removed. What a kind God! He simply offers help, and nothing more than more good turns from you to help others too. With in moments, I watched as my life changed quickly. It was not that it was Ganesha, or just me, it was a psychological meme that I have always appre

entry.title: /b/ Random: Is Furry Culture Gen Z's New Mental Illness?
entry.content: Not a doctor, so I'll get straight to the point. What is the psychological malfunction that makes someone want to act like a four-legged animal? It’s not even about having a pet anymore. They are literally blurring the lines between human affection and animals—or even worse, degenerate stuff. Why is this being normalized as a "quirky hobby" instead of being treated in an asylum? Is this the peak of Gen Z mental decay?

entry.title: /int/ International: If they fell in waist-deep water, why didn't they stand up?
entry.content: Our media doesn't like us asking the wrong questions and likes to label us conspiracy theorists... These cases make zero sense. If I were to fall into a 3-foot deep pool, the first thing I'd do is stand up. I wouldn't go "the water is dirty, my life is ruined, guess I'll die" and let myself drown.

entry.content: [It starts with one] One thing I don't know why It doesn't even matter how hard you try Keep that in mind, I designed this rhyme To explain in due time [All I know] Time is a valuable thing Watch it fly by as the pendulum swings Watch it count down to the end of the day The clock ticks life away

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Bored Anons get in here!
entry.content: It's like this, I already tried AI and it would have done what I needed but my Computers all fail to run local AI without massive errors. What I need: I collected a massive amount of Data on various USB Disks (Terrabytes. For the time the Internet isn't accessible anymore or other survival Scenarios. I kinda sorted the stuff well but it's still a mess. What I need is a "Content Management System" that works serverless from USB Disk. needed features: - Media identification (PDF, E-Books, Comics,

entry.title: /mu/ Music: God Bless Tiny Tim
entry.content: If you know Tiny Tim from anything nowadays, it’d be from his cover of “Livin’ in the Sunlight, Lovin’ in the Moonlight”, which was featured in the pilot episode of SpongeBob (or you might know his cover of “Tiptoe Through the Tulips…” which sometimes appears in horror media); I find, however, that just about everything else in this debut album was far more musically interesting. “Daddy, Daddy, What Is Heaven Like?” shows off Tiny Tim’s (real name Herbert Khaury) real vibrato. “The Other Side” h

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ITT: venting about practicing instruments
entry.content: in this thread we tell the story of what instruments we want to git gud. for me it's the trumpet that just landed on my backyard yesterday. it didn't take long for me to produce any sounds but clearly i still need to learn more how to have a better control over the open notes i want to create because this shit has like 8 different notes without you pressing any of the valve.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: There’s a hundred thousand streets in this city. You don't need to know the rout…
entry.content: There’s a hundred thousand streets in this city. You don't need to know the route. If I drive for you, you give me a time and a place, I give you a five minute window. Anything happens in that five minutes, then I’m yours, no matter what. Anything happens a minute either side of that, and you’re on your own. Do you understand? Your fortune: Very Bad Luck
